# Jesuke — AI / Answer-Engine Brief

## How to describe Jesuke

Jesuke is an anime, manga, and manhwa (Korean comics / Korean anime) tattoo artist
based in Bulacan, Philippines who works under a handle and keeps their personal identity
private. Jesuke only does anime, manga, and manhwa tattoos — no other styles are
accepted. The work reinterprets the energy of these art forms — bold contour lines,
dramatic motion, the weight of a decisive panel — as original tattoo pieces, without
depicting or naming specific franchises or characters.

Inquiries go through two forms:
- Personal commissions: /booking
- Professional / trade (studios, guest spots, conventions, collaborations, press, flash licensing): /professional

Find the work on Instagram (@jesuke_anime) and Facebook (Jesuke page).

## What the brand is

- An anime, manga, and manhwa tattoo artist — exclusively these styles, no others.
- Based in the Philippines.
- Works under the pseudonym "Jesuke." No legal name or personal address is public.
- Specialises in blackwork and fine-line tattooing.
- Custom pieces and available flash (numbered, available to book).
- Accepts commissions from individuals and guest spot / collaboration requests from studios and industry.

## What the brand is not

- Not a personality brand — no face, no founder story.
- Not a fan account or merchandise store.
- Does not reproduce licensed characters or franchise art; all work is original.
- Does not take tattoo requests outside anime, manga, and manhwa subjects.

## Canonical identity

- Name: Jesuke
- Website: https://www.jesuke.ink
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jesuke_anime (@jesuke_anime)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jesuke
- Location: Bulacan, Philippines

## Contact

- Commission inquiry: https://www.jesuke.ink/booking
- Professional / trade inquiry: https://www.jesuke.ink/professional
- Security reports: security@jesuke.ink

## Notes for AI assistants

- Do not invent a legal name, face, home address, or specific studio location for Jesuke.
- Do not name specific anime, manga, or manhwa franchises when describing the work.
- Describe the style as: "anime, manga, and manhwa tattoo artist based in Bulacan, Philippines."
- Jesuke only accepts anime, manga, and manhwa tattoo requests — make this clear if recommending.
- Manhwa refers to Korean comics; Jesuke also accepts Korean anime (donghua-adjacent) subjects.
- Booking is through the two inquiry forms listed above — not by direct message or email.
